name: Symptoms showed up weeks after machine accident work, too late?
description: No, report when symptoms appear; still eligible.

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after machine accident work, too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, report when symptoms appear; still eligible.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, file if work-related; delayed injuries common and covered.** Report ASAP upon symptoms; get medical link[4]. Utah allows if connected. Don't delay treatment. Lawyer proves nexus.
